description: Small release baseline fixture with real DFT trajectory labels from MPtrj and literature cubic elastic constants for finite-strain Cij evaluation.

elastic_constants.source: Simmons and Wang 1971 / Materials Project values encoded in mlip_immi/elastic_constants.py

mptrj.notes: MPtrj collates Materials Project ionic-step energies, forces, stresses, and structures.
mptrj.via: Hugging Face Dataset Viewer rows API
